item.title: Version 1.7.9
item.description:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<style>
  body {
    font-family: -apple-system, sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #e0e0e0;
    background: #1e1e1e;
    margin: 16px 20px;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }
  h2 {
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #ffffff;
    margin: 0 0 10px 0;
  }
  ul {
    margin: 4px 0 0 0;
    padding-left: 18px;
  }
  li {
    margin-bottom: 5px;
    color: #cccccc;
  }
  li strong {
    color: #ffffff;
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>
v1.7.9 — Reliability improvements  Fixed an issue where tapping the refresh button while a background refresh was already in progress would silently do nothing. Manual refresh now immediately cancels the in-flight request and restarts.  Also suppressed a spurious "Unexpected response format" error that appeared on the first launch after a system restart, caused by a brief window where the network is up but APIs aren't yet responding normally. The app now recovers silently on the next refresh cycle. 
</body>
</html>
